title: tribulus terrestris subsp. orientalis
intro: Tribulus terrestris subsp. orientalis, also known as Oriental puncture vine, is a subspecies of the Tribulus terrestris plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Zygophyllaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of Tribulus terrestris subsp. orientalis include improved cardiovascular function, enhanced sexual performance, and increased testosterone levels, making it a popular herbal remedy for men's health issues. It can be prepared as a herbal supplement in capsule, tablet, or powder form, or consumed as a tea, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
